[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000 2
1 1100010 3
2 0101101 4
3 1111011 6
4 1111011 6
5 1011111 6
6 1111111 a
7 0111100 4

01 10 1111011 6 match 3 4

23 32 0111111 6
34 43 1011111 6 match 5
45 54 1111110 6
56 65 0111110 5
67 76 0111110 5
70 07 0100100 2

13 31 1111111 a match 6
24 42 1111011 6 match 3 4
35 53 0111101 5
46 64 1111110 6

71 17 1111111 a match 6

50 05 0111100 4 match 7
61 16 1111111 a match 6
72 27 0111111 6

37 73 0111101 5
